query: I need a weekly summary of our team's performance - conversations resolved, first response time, and resolution time. How do I pull this data?
expected_behavior: Uses reports_agents_summary with since/until as Unix timestamps for last 7 days
Mentions getting overview data from reports_overview for real-time counts
Explains key metrics: conversations_count, avg_first_response_time, avg_resolution_time
Shows timestamp conversion (e.g., date +%s for Unix epoch)

baseline_without_skill.likely_response: May not know which report endpoint to use or that timestamps must be Unix epoch

with_skill_expected.response_quality: High - correct report tools with proper Unix timestamp parameters

query: I want to compare performance across all our inboxes to see which channel has the slowest response times. What's the best way?
expected_behavior: Uses reports_inboxes_summary to get per-inbox metrics
May supplement with reports_inboxes for time-series data
Suggests comparing FRT across inboxes to identify bottlenecks

baseline_without_skill.likely_response: May suggest per-inbox queries rather than the summary endpoint

with_skill_expected.response_quality: High - uses correct summary endpoint and explains metric comparison approach

query: My agents are complaining about uneven workload distribution. How can I check if conversations are evenly assigned?
expected_behavior: Uses reports_agents_summary to get per-agent conversation counts
Also suggests reports_overview for current open/pending/unattended counts
Explains how to derive workload balance from the data
May suggest conversations_meta for real-time assignment overview

baseline_without_skill.likely_response: May not know which specific report tools provide workload data

with_skill_expected.response_quality: High - uses correct tools to analyze agent workload distribution
